name: PatternInput
description: A formatted input component that applies pattern-based formatting to user input using react-number-format. Ideal for phone numbers, credit cards, dates, and other structured data entry with automatic formatting.
usage_guidelines: Use for inputs requiring specific formatting patterns.
Define format pattern using # as digit placeholders.
Use mask prop to show placeholder characters.
Handle formatted and raw values via onValueChange.

format.description: Pattern string where # represents a digit. Example: '###-###-####' for phone numbers.

mask.description: Character(s) to show as placeholder in unfilled positions. Example: '_' shows '___-___-____'.

onValueChange.description: Callback with formatted value, raw value, and float value. Preferred over onChange for accessing unformatted data.

inputPrefix.description: Element or text to display before the input value.

inputSuffix.description: Element or text to display after the input value.

allowEmptyFormatting.description: Shows format pattern even when input is empty.

...InputProps.description: All standard Input component props are supported.

styling_info.visual_description: Renders as a standard Input component with automatic formatting applied as the user types. Supports all Input styling variants and states.

Do: Use for phone numbers, credit cards, SSN, dates
Provide clear format hints via placeholder or mask
Use onValueChange to get unformatted values
Add appropriate inputMode for mobile keyboards
Validate the raw value, not formatted value
Dont: Don't use for free-form text input
Don't forget to handle partial input states
Don't use complex patterns without user guidance
Don't store formatted values in database

Basic.title: Basic

WithForm.title: With Form
